repos_pt:
[CaioCampos](https://github.com/caiocampos/CaioCampos) Página de perfil no github, montada por automação utilizando md-fuse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse

[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) Programa em Rust para montar arquivos markdown para diversas línguas. Para a versão em Python acesse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[primes](https://github.com/caiocampos/primes) Biblioteca WebAssembly (Wasm) criada em Rust para efetuar diversos cálculos relacionados à números primos (página utilizando Angular 22). Pacote npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes
repos_en:
[CaioCampos](https://github.com/caiocampos/CaioCampos) Profile page in github, mounted by automation using md-fuse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse

[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) Rust program to mount markdown files for various languages. For Python version access: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[primes](https://github.com/caiocampos/primes) WebAssembly Library (Wasm) created in Rust to perform several calculations related to prime numbers (page using Angular 22). npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes
repos_es:
[CaioCampos](https://github.com/caiocampos/CaioCampos) Página de perfil en github, montada por automatización utilizando md-fuse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse

[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) Programa en Rust para montar archivos markdown para diversas lenguas. Para la versión de Python visite: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[primes](https://github.com/caiocampos/primes) Biblioteca WebAssembly (Wasm) creada en Rust para realizar diversos cálculos relacionados con números primos (página utilizando Angular 22). Paquete npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes
